title: Evidence Record
description: One JSONL line per source confirmation. Stored at interview_questions_knowledge/evidence/<question_id>.jsonl. Append-only. Loop 2 reads these to compute independent_source_count after running citation-cycle dedup against the cites graph.

source_tier.description: Tier from AGENT.md source taxonomy. Tier 1 = high signal; Tier 5 = company-specific deep dives.

url.description: Full URL of the page that contained the evidence.

url_hash.description: sha256(url) — also the filename in sources_cache/.

fetched_at.description: When the source was retrieved (ISO-8601). Used by TTL policy.

report_year.description: Calendar year the source claims the interview occurred. Used for the rolling Y / Y-1 / Y-2 recency window in Loop 2.

exact_quote.description: Verbatim excerpt from the source. Required so Loop 4 can challenge whether the quote actually supports the question.

translated_quote.description: English translation if exact_quote is non-English (e.g. 1Point3Acres Chinese content). Same content as exact_quote when source is already English.

company.description: Company the evidence attributes the question to.

company_frequency.description: If the source provides an explicit count (e.g. LeetCode 'asked 108 times'), record it here.

level_tag.description: Role/level the source attributes the question to (e.g. 'L4', 'SDE2', 'New Grad'). Optional.

cites.description: Other URLs this evidence record cites. Used by Loop 2 to detect citation cycles. If A cites B and B cites A (or transitively), they are NOT independent.

cited_by.description: Reverse index. Maintained by Loop 2 for fast cycle detection.

confirmed_in_cycle.description: Cycle number when this evidence was added. Append-only; existing records keep their original cycle.

rescraped_in_cycles.description: Cycles in which the same URL was re-fetched and the quote was re-confirmed.

confidence.description: Source-extractor confidence that the quote actually corresponds to this question. Values < 0.7 are excluded by Loop 2.

raw_excerpt_path.description: Optional: path to a longer raw excerpt in sources_cache/<url_hash>.json for re-validation by Loop 4.
